## For Data Submissions Only

- [ ] I ran `python scripts/validate_submission.py <file>` locally and it passed
- [ ] I confirm this entry contains no patient-identifiable information
- [ ] I confirm the `outcome` field describes a genuine negative/null result
- [ ] I have set a `license` field (CC0-1.0 recommended)

## For Code/Tooling Changes Only

- [ ] I ran `pytest tests/` locally and all tests pass
- [ ] I updated documentation if behavior changed
- [ ] I did not introduce new required dependencies without discussion (or I noted why one is needed)
